_comment: EMMA LLM evaluation lineup. Single source of truth for all notebooks and scripts.
_benchmark: Models selected based on Medmarks medical benchmark (tiny model category, verifiable tasks).
_backend: HuggingFace transformers + bitsandbytes. All models loaded in 4-bit (nf4) on Colab T4.

models.name: Qwen3 4B (Thinking)
models.thinking_note: Pass enable_thinking=True in chat template. Thinking tokens wrapped in <think>...</think> and stripped before returning answer.

models.name: Qwen3 8B (Thinking)
models.thinking_note: Pass enable_thinking=True in chat template. Thinking tokens wrapped in <tool_call>...<tool_call> and stripped before returning answer.

excluded_models.name: Ministral 3B
excluded_models.gated_note: Requires HF token and license acceptance at huggingface.co/mistralai/Ministral-3B-Instruct-2410

excluded_models.name: MedGemma 4B
excluded_models.gated_note: Requires HF token and HAI-DEF terms acceptance at huggingface.co/google/medgemma-4b-it

excluded_models.name: Gemma 3 4B
excluded_models.gated_note: Requires HF token and Gemma license acceptance at huggingface.co/google/gemma-3-4b-it
excluded_models.eval_note: Included as baseline for MedGemma comparison — same base model, different training.

excluded_models.name: Phi-4 Mini [3.8B]
excluded_models.eval_note: Not ranked in Medmarks tiny category. Included as architectural outlier — Microsoft efficiency-focused training approach differs from all others.

excluded_models.name: LLaMA 3.2 3B
excluded_models.reason: Not ranked in Medmarks tiny medical benchmark. Replaced by models with empirical medical task evidence.

excluded_models.name: Granite 4 3B
excluded_models.reason: Medmarks explicitly identifies Granite 4.0 as underperforming models in the weight class below it on medical tasks.

excluded_models.name: Falcon 3 3B
excluded_models.reason: Not ranked in Medmarks tiny medical benchmark. No medical QA benchmark data to justify inclusion.

excluded_models.name: Cogito 3B
excluded_models.reason: Performance claims unverified by independent medical benchmarks. Not ranked in Medmarks.

excluded_models.name: Ministral 3B Reasoning
excluded_models.reason: Medmarks rank 50 (win rate 0.3618) — lower than Ministral 3B Instruct (rank 47, 0.4173). Instruct variant is stronger for medical QA.
